results.evidence: ACGate.shouldSyncExternal() returns shouldSync:false when no ACs transition. LifecycleHookDispatcher.ts:129 sets skipExternalSync accordingly.
ac-gate.ts:57-59 detects AC transitions, returns shouldSync:true with affected story IDs. LifecycleHookDispatcher.ts:129 allows external sync.
LifecycleHookDispatcher.ts:139-145 calls LivingDocsSync.syncIncrement() regardless of skipExternalSync flag. Living docs always fires.
ac-gate.ts:36-38 returns shouldSync:true when task has no AC tags (backward compat). Tests confirm in ac-gate.test.ts.
sync-resilience.ts:142-149 enqueues retry on failure. sync-retry-queue.ts:71-98 persists with all required fields.
sync-resilience.ts:91-116 checks CachedRateLimiter.canProceed() for GitHub; queues if not allowed.
sync-resilience.ts:66-88 checks CircuitBreakerRegistry.get(provider).canSync(); queues if open.
sync-retry.ts:74-122 processes pending entries with backoff. bin/specweave.js registers sync-retry command.
LifecycleHookDispatcher.ts onIncrementDone() now calls drainRetryQueueForIncrement() in STEP 3 (fixed during grill).
sync-resilience.ts writes audit entries on all paths: success (L125-130), failure (L152-158), circuit open (L75-79), rate limit (L102-106).
sync-retry.ts:92-97 marks failed at maxAttempts. sync-retry-queue.ts:115-122 sets status='failed' without removing.
cached-rate-limiter.ts:27,66 uses 60s TTL cache. getOrRefresh() checks cache age before calling underlying checker.
OverviewPage.tsx fetches /api/sync/errors?hours=24&limit=5, renders 'Recent Sync Errors' panel conditionally.
types.ts:21 adds 'sync-error' to SSEEventType. SyncResilience writes notifications that trigger SSE via file watcher.
sync-resilience.ts:161-167 calls notificationAdd on failure. Notification is written to notifications.json.
SyncPage.tsx AuditTable has expandedIdx state, click-to-toggle rows, expanded <pre> block showing full error.
OverviewPage.tsx fetches /api/sync/gaps, renders amber badge with count linking to /sync.
sync-gaps.ts:59-67 lists gaps with incrementId, synced/missing providers, last activity.
sync-gaps.ts:69-86 iterates gaps and calls fixFn(incrementId, provider) when --fix passed.
sync-gaps.ts:53-56 outputs JSON.stringify(gaps) with SyncGapItem having all required fields.
sync-status.ts now imports CachedRateLimiter, displays remaining/limit/percentUsed in Rate Limits section (fixed during grill).
sync-gaps.ts:42 exits 1 on gaps. sync-status.ts:77 exits 1 on issues.

findings.title: drainRetryQueueForIncrement not wired into onIncrementDone
findings.issue: AC-US2-05 required retry queue drain on increment closure but the call was missing from onIncrementDone().
findings.suggestion: Added drainRetryQueueForIncrement() call as STEP 3 in onIncrementDone().
findings.impact: Failed syncs would never be retried on increment closure.

findings.title: sync-retry attemptCount never incremented on failure
findings.issue: When sync-retry failed, the entry stayed in queue with same attemptCount, causing infinite retries for entries at attemptCount=1.
findings.suggestion: Added remove-and-re-enqueue with incremented attemptCount and fresh backoff on failure.
findings.impact: Entries would be retried indefinitely instead of respecting maxAttempts.

findings.title: Rate limit info missing from sync-status output
findings.issue: AC-US4-04 requires rate limit remaining counts but sync-status only showed retry queue and circuit breakers.
findings.suggestion: Added CachedRateLimiter dep injection and Rate Limits output section.
findings.impact: Users couldn't see rate limit status from CLI, reducing observability.
